issues.description: Type annotation for dequantize_tensor return is too loose (Any for qstate)

sharedStateObservations.content: bitsandbytes Python 3.14 Compatibility: Some unit tests may fail on Python 3.14 due to bitsandbytes compatibility issues. This is an external dependency issue and does not affect core functionality. Affected tests: test_quantization.py, test_kv_cache.py. Workaround: Tests can be skipped on Python 3.14+ if needed.

notes: Weight quantization implementation is solid. Uses bitsandbytes for 4-bit (NF4) and 8-bit block-wise quantization. Custom safetensors format for efficient storage. Tests verify round-trip accuracy, compression ratios, and edge cases. Code is well-documented with docstrings. One syntax error in test file was fixed during this review.
